scope: Read-only identifier and N<=20 support scan of the server-resident MatPES 2025.2 JSONL artifacts.

data_contract.reason: The same material identifier occurs under both functionals, so row-wise splitting would leak structural identity across train and evaluation.
data_contract.larger_cells: Retained in raw data but excluded from the first GaugeFlow-base physical-pretraining cache.
data_contract.energy_target_reason: Cohesive energy is present for every eligible PBE and r2SCAN row and differs from total energy only by composition-dependent elemental references; formation energy is present for only a minority of rows and is not silently substituted.
